creator: support@spectrum.ru
text:
Update port net-mgmt/argus3-clients up to 3.0.2
	Removed:
		net-mgmt/argus3-clients/files/patch-clients::Makefile.in
		net-mgmt/argus3-clients/files/patch-common::Makefile.in
		net-mgmt/argus3-clients/files/patch-common::argus_util.c
		net-mgmt/argus3-clients/files/patch-radium::Makefile.in
		net-mgmt/argus3-clients/files/patch-ragrep::Makefile.in
		net-mgmt/argus3-clients/files/patch-ratop::Makefile.in
		net-mgmt/argus3-clients/files

Fix: 1. cd /usr/ports
	2. rm -rf net-mgmt/argus3-clients/files
	3. applay this patch
